name: T-R minimal medium + Guaymas Basin hydrothermally-influenced sediment (mixed labile+complex organic matter) (PMC10942773)
description: T-R minimal medium + Guaymas Basin hydrothermally-influenced sediment (mixed labile+complex organic matter) — medium reported in PMC10942773 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC10942773 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.formulation_warning: workflow correction sparse; kept original — Real growth condition: T-R marine minimal medium base + hydrothermally-influenced Guaymas Basin sediment as a COMPLEX, undefined natural organic-carbon source (pre-aged petroleum-derived + labile OC). Aerobic (~20% O2). Current entry lists only O2 and wrongly says 'facultative'; carbon source and base salts were left in 'uncovered'. The carbon source is a natural sediment and is inherently not chemically definable (correctly kept as a complex/uncovered component). Full T-R base salt recipe is in supplementary Table S3 / ref 33 only — not in main text — so base salt amounts are not fabricated. Not rejected: this is a genuine T-R-medium + complex-substrate condition, not a mislabelled substrate list.
provenance.verification_evidence: Vibrio sp. 1A01 and Pseudoalteromonas sp. 3D05 were coincubated at room temperature with ~22 g (dry weight) of decarbonated, sterilized sediment. Sediment total organic carbon (TOC) content was previously measured to be ~3.5%, equating to ~770 mg of organic carbon (final concentration of ~385 mg C L−1) ... along with ... T-R minimal medium

uncovered.name: decarbonated sterilized hydrothermal sediment organic carbon
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

uncovered.name: T-R minimal medium base salts
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

oxygen_note: no oxygen requirement specified; O2 available but not asserted
